campaign_status.current_focus: Drive waitlist sign‑ups with engineering‑focused Reel

today_priority: Produce the Reel for post_id 2026-05-16-REEL-ATIONS so it can be scheduled and start collecting waitlist sign‑ups.

blocked_items.reason: Visual assets not yet created; Visual Brief exists but Reel is still in WAITING state.
blocked_items.required_fix: Film and edit the Reel according to the Visual Brief shot list, then upload the exported file to the Manual Reel State.

blocked_items.reason: Manual Reel State shows status WAITING with no exported file.
blocked_items.required_fix: Upload the completed Reel file and set status to READY_FOR_REVIEW.

blocked_items.reason: Post status is WAITING; no scheduled time or platform upload.
blocked_items.required_fix: Once Reel is approved, schedule it on Instagram Reel and TikTok with link in bio to waitlist.

manual_reel_actions: Upload completed Reel file for post_id 2026-05-16-REEL-ATIONS
manual_post_actions: Schedule Reel on Instagram and TikTok after approval
Add waitlist CTA link in bio and post description
next_3_actions: Film and edit Reel according to Visual Brief (shots 1‑6).
Upload exported Reel file and change Manual Reel status to READY_FOR_REVIEW.
Schedule the Reel on Instagram and TikTok with the approved caption and waitlist link.
do_not_do: Use any language implying Swatch or Audemars Piguet affiliation.
Add generic countdown timers or hype‑bro urgency.
Compare directly to 3D‑printed kits by name.
success_condition: Reel published with approved copy and visual assets, generating at least 500 waitlist sign‑ups within the first 48 hours and achieving an engagement rate above 8 %.
